g.onclick: sendPrompt('What node features should I encode per B-Rep face for a GNN?')
sendPrompt('What edge features should I encode per B-Rep edge for a GNN?')
sendPrompt('What graph-level labels should I assign for process classification training?')
sendPrompt('How do I construct a PyG Data object from B-Rep topology?')
sendPrompt('How do I sample a point cloud from a mesh for PointNet++ input?')
sendPrompt('What per-point features should I add beyond xyz for CAD recognition?')
sendPrompt('What sampling strategy should I use for PointNet++ on industrial parts?')
sendPrompt('What does PointNet++ output — per-point labels or global class?')
